name: 1 (副本)
queries: 请生成一张高端医疗美容诊所的室内环境图，场景设定为一间现代化的皮肤管理治疗室，整体空间采用极简主义的白色与原木色搭配，营造出专业、洁净且温馨的氛围。画面中央是一张符合人体工学的电动美容床，床头配备专业的LED光谱治疗仪和射频美容仪器，墙面安装有大尺寸的电子皮肤检测仪显示屏，实时展示皮肤分析数据。房间一侧设有落地式的护肤品展示柜，陈列着各类高端医美品牌的产品，包括玻尿酸精华、胶原蛋白面膜、抗衰安瓶等。天花板上安装有无影手术灯和智能调光系统，可根据治疗需求调节色温与亮度。背景中可以看到一扇带有磨砂玻璃的推拉门，隐约透出走廊的柔和灯光。整体画面要求光线柔和自然，采用医疗级洁净光源，阴影过渡细腻，材质表现真实，包括皮革床面的质感、金属仪器的冷冽光泽、以及木质元素的温润触感。构图采用对称式布局，强调空间的专业性与秩序感，同时通过绿植点缀增添生机，体现现代医美空间"科技与自然融合"的设计理念。画面风格偏向商业摄影，色彩饱和度适中，适合用于医美机构的官方宣传册或高端杂志广告。

scoring_dimensions.label: 意图还原度
scoring_dimensions.description: prompt 是否抓住了用户原意

final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a high-end medical aesthetic clinic interior, specifically a modern skin management treatment room.

Style/medium: commercial architectural photography, clean minimalist aesthetic with natural warmth, editorial style suitable for luxury magazine spreads and brand collateral
Composition: symmetrical centered layout, eye-level perspective, medium focal length capturing full treatment room depth, balanced negative space emphasizing professional order
Subject: ergonomic electric aesthetic treatment bed as central anchor, surrounded by medical-grade LED light therapy device and radiofrequency equipment, large digital skin analysis display on wall showing data readouts
Scene/backdrop: minimalist white and natural wood interior, floor-to-ceiling skincare display cabinet with luxury medical beauty products (hyaluronic acid serums, collagen masks, anti-aging ampoules), frosted glass sliding door with soft corridor light diffusing through, subtle green plant accents
Lighting/mood: soft natural medical-grade clean lighting with intelligent dimming system, shadowless surgical ceiling lights, gentle color temperature transitions, warm yet clinical atmosphere
Color palette: warm white as base, natural wood tones as anchor, soft greens from plants as accent, restrained saturation for premium feel
Materials/textures: genuine leather bed surface with subtle grain, cold metallic sheen on precision instruments, warm tactile wood grain, frosted glass diffusion, matte medical-grade surfaces
Constraints: must convey "technology meets nature" design philosophy; emphasize professional cleanliness and warmth simultaneously; suitable for official promotional brochures and high-end magazine advertising
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh fluorescent lighting, plastic-looking materials, over-saturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer terms

final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: commercial-photography
Asset type: editorial interior shot for medical spa brand brochure and luxury magazine advertisement
Primary request: modern minimalist skin treatment room in high-end medical aesthetics clinic, embodying "technology meets nature" design philosophy
Scene/backdrop: contemporary medical spa treatment room with frosted glass sliding door revealing soft corridor lighting in background, professional environment with clean lines
Subject: ergonomic electric treatment bed with leather upholstery at center, professional LED light therapy device and RF beauty equipment mounted at head, large digital skin analyzer display on wall showing real-time skin analysis data, floor-to-ceiling skincare display cabinet with premium medical-grade products (hyaluronic acid serums, collagen masks, anti-aging ampoules), shadowless surgical lamp and intelligent dimming system on ceiling
Style/medium: commercial interior photography, photorealistic, architectural editorial style
Composition/framing: symmetrical layout emphasizing professionalism and order, balanced perspective shot, medium-wide angle to capture spatial depth
Lighting/mood: soft natural medical-grade clean lighting with gentle shadows, color temperature adjustable smart lighting system, warm and professional atmosphere
Color palette: minimalist white + natural wood tones + subtle green accents from plants, moderate saturation, clean and inviting
Materials/textures: genuine leather bed surface with realistic grain, cold metallic sheen on medical instruments, warm tactile wood elements, frosted glass translucency, premium skincare packaging
Constraints: maintain symmetrical composition, preserve "high-end medical aesthetics" positioning, keep technology-nature balance with green plant accents
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, plastic-looking materials, oversaturated colors, watermark, text overlay
